ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the content item */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or source of the content item */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type (foreign key to content_types table) */,
  "usage_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the content will be used */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the content item was created or added to the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the content item was last updated */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the content item (e.g., jpg, mp4) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the content item in bytes */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content source (foreign key to content_sources table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_items_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_items_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES content_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission request */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item the permission request is for */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address to contact for permission */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the permission request was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission request (e.g., letter sent, approved, denied) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (if applicable) */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., exclusive, non-exclusive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES content_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the content item is used in */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the content item was used */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of how the content item was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., commercial, personal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_usages_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES content_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_usages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager (foreign key to users table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the content source (e.g., artist, platform) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the content source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the content source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of content source (e.g., Artist, Platform) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the content source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, legal, compliance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item accessed */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission request accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content or permission */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES content_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., Picture, Video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission template */,
  "template_content" TEXT /* Content of the permission template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_template_usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission template used */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission request */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the permission template was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_template_usages_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_template_usages_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES permission_templates ("template_id")
)
